prompt: What’s a small thing I do that makes you feel loved?
What’s your favorite way for me to flirt with you?
Lights on or lights off — and why?
What’s one boundary you want us to keep crystal-clear every time?
Give your partner a 30-second compliment avalanche (no teasing, just hype).
Text your partner a one-line flirt while they’re in the same room — then read it out loud.
Kiss your partner slowly for 20 seconds, then ask: ‘More or slower?’
Pick a safeword and a ‘yellow’ word together, then practice using them once as a joke.
